name: Scott Lee

contactInfo.office: 200 N. Kaufman St., Mount Vernon, TX 75457

bio: Scott Lee serves as the Franklin County Judge, the chief executive and administrative officer of Franklin County. The county judge presides over the Commissioners Court and oversees county government operations including budgeting, emergency management, and infrastructure in the Mount Vernon area.
campaignPromises: Keep Franklin County taxes low while maintaining services
Support law enforcement and public safety
